---
title: 'Sea Life Aquarium  Grapevine, Texas'
date: '2014-04-06T05:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3312828360892390843'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/lif-review-of-sea-life-aquarium.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<h2>
<a href="http://www.visitsealife.com/grapevine/" target="_blank">Sea Life Aquarium&nbsp;</a></h2>
<h3>
Grapevine, Texas</h3>
<a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/sea-life-aquarium-grapevine" target="_blank">See On Yelp (Click Here)</a><br />
<h4>
Rating (5 Being the Best)</h4>
<b>5+</b><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140831-b0339cd7d42a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Sea Stars Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140831-b0339cd7d42a.jpg" height="480" title="Sea Life Aquarium Sea Stars Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="640" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sea Life Aquarium Sea Stars Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<h4>
Overview</h4>
Sea Life Aquarium is small, but a great place of wonder. I used to go between jobs and just sit in the shark tunnel and gaze at the awe inspiring world under the sea.<br />
<br />
It's built as a tour type facility. You go into a circular room where a school of silver fish swim around and around you. You are directed on through other exhibits. The highlights are the Ray Tank and the Shark Tunnel. You are 17-19 feet under water in the shark tunnel. Surrounded by fish, rays, sharks, and yes a even a turtle.<br />
<br />
You move on to see Jelly Fish, Sea Horses, a fresh water local fish exhibit, and then you end with a touch tank and playground upstairs.<br />
<br />
There is also a new interactive video game on the wall near the NEMO and DORI tank. (At least that's what we call it when we pass by).<br />
<br />
Before you leave, stop by the on going video room. Adults can sit and kids can see real stories about the rescues they've seen there.<br />
<br />
As a man who has a piece of me that misses the California Beaches, it's a great place to visit, and visit as often as I'm near.<br />
<h4>
Cost</h4>
Costs can change <a href="http://www.visitsealife.com/grapevine/buy-tickets/" target="_blank">CLICK HERE</a> for ticket prices. It's not that expensive, but as I feel with most of these places it's better to get the annual pass unless you are just in town visiting. This makes a great place to visit often.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Kids</h4>
The kids REALLY enjoy coming, they especially enjoy the two viewing areas in the big tank, the kids area to climb under the walkway and see inside the ray tank. They also enjoy the rescued turtle tank.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Tips to enjoy it better...</h4>
<div>
<ul>
<li>Get the annual pass if you are looking for a fun place to spend a few hours a few times a year.&nbsp;</li>
<li>ONLINE PRICES ARE LOWER, but your tickets/passes online.&nbsp;</li>
<li>It's not big, but it is bigger than you'd think from a place inside a mall. It's packed with fun places to sit and be in awe.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Photos</h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140326-141324-84cad45c8615.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140326-141324-84cad45c8615.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="238" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135506-bbfc04baf96d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135506-bbfc04baf96d.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135528-4ff1e87490e6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135528-4ff1e87490e6.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135651-c52abe028b37.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135651-c52abe028b37.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135750-ef7e401fdc21.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135750-ef7e401fdc21.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="238" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135851-99741beed52c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-135851-99741beed52c.jpg" height="320" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="238" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140006-c2119cc94f5b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140006-c2119cc94f5b.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140319-71bf4a387342.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140319-71bf4a387342.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140410-5b3b43152ca7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140410-5b3b43152ca7.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140437-0df6720a8b33.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140437-0df6720a8b33.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140524-45bc2201306f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140524-45bc2201306f.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140540-5b2562e12321.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140540-5b2562e12321.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140552-c5841507c7dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140552-c5841507c7dd.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140626-9a8f810f5de3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140626-9a8f810f5de3.jpg" height="240" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140809-3ca60cff6aa7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140809-3ca60cff6aa7.jpg" height="240" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140831-aeb33eb7771b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140831-aeb33eb7771b.jpg" height="240" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140931-a80ac718f148.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140931-a80ac718f148.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140957-acd19bc3439d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-140957-acd19bc3439d.jpg" height="240" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141038-3284226fe4dc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141038-3284226fe4dc.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141113-052bf4f6233f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141113-052bf4f6233f.jpg" height="238" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141125-0df8015ac8b0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140330-141125-0df8015ac8b0.jpg" height="240" title="Sea Life Aquarium Attribution DarrellWolfe.Com" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
Blog Connect:</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li>
<li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li>
<li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li>
<li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li>
</ul>
<h4>
Connect:</h4>
<div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-5eb48148a2fd.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-edc9e1cba163.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-3ffb893d0144.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-e84cbcff6e22.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4>
<i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br />
<i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i><br />
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;">
<b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4>
